Author: Josh
UsageNotes:
Intended for use where pickface locations do not contain physical TrackingEntity barcodes. When you replenish to a location that already contains the MasterItem being replenished, it will add to the existing TrackingEntity. If the MasterItem does not yet exist in the pickface location, a new TrackingEntity will be created.

Pickface locations must have type PICKFACE assigned.
ImplementationNotes: Ensure your pickface locations type is set to PICKFACE. SQLCLR procedures must be deployed and configured to use this process.
Name: REPLENISH_PICKFACE
Description:
REPLENISH PICKFACE

Intended for use where pickface locations do not contain physical TrackingEntity barcodes. When you replenish to a location that already contains the MasterItem being replenished, it will add to the existing TrackingEntity. If the MasterItem does not yet exist in the pickface location, a new TrackingEntity will be created.

Pickface locations must have type PICKFACE assigned.

Ensure your pickface locations type is set to PICKFACE. SQLCLR procedures must be deployed and configured to use this process.
